description: You are Daniel Park, Vice President of Crisis Communications at Meridian Public Relations. Log in to the agency's Socioboard platform (email: admin@socioboard.local, password: Admin2024!) to establish emergency crisis monitoring infrastructure. This involves deleting all teams starting with '[ARCHIVED]' and updating your admin profile with the name Daniel Park, phone '+44-7700-900042', timezone 'Europe/London', and the bio 'VP of Crisis Communications at Meridian PR. Specializing in brand reputation management and rapid response strategy.'. Create three crisis monitoring teams named 'Crisis: Media Monitoring', 'Crisis: Social Sentiment', and 'Crisis: Executive Briefing', ensuring Victoria Santos (victoria.santos@socioboard.local) is added to all three and John Smith (john.smith@socioboard.local) is added to the Media Monitoring and Social Sentiment teams. Additionally, configure the following crisis news monitoring RSS feeds: https://feeds.reuters.com/reuters/topNews, https://rss.app/feeds/tOpnv7C6QT6CLXD7.xml, https://www.prnewswire.com/rss/news-releases-list.rss, and https://feeds.bloomberg.com/politics/news.rss.
